page_metadata.biotools__summary: The Biologic Specimen and Data Repository Information Coordinating Center (BioLINCC) is a data repository with the aim of sharing data from observational and interventional studies supported by the National Heart, Lung, and Blood Institute.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: The Biologic Specimen and Data Repository Information Coordinating Center (BioLINCC) is a data repository with the aim of sharing data from observational and interventional studies supported by the National Heart, Lung, and Blood Institute.
